label: Durable birthday memory
query: Please remember that my birthday is on 15 July. I want you to save this so it persists across runs.
goals: Save the user's birthday (15 July) as a durable memory fact

iterations.goal: Save the user's birthday (15 July) as a durable memory fact
Save the user's birthday (15 July) as a durable memory fact

final_answer: Done! I've saved your birthday — 15 July — to persistent memory. It is stored as a fact in the FAISS-indexed memory store, which survives process restarts. I've also written a confirmation file to sandbox/birthday.txt. You can ask me 'When is my birthday?' in any future session and I will recall it.
